title: Distinguished Alumni Speaker Series
description: After surveying students about how they wanted to connect with NYU alumni, the CCD and the NYU Global Alumni Programs office designed the “Distinguished
text:
Distinguished Alumni Speaker Series
After surveying students about how they wanted to connect with NYU alumni, the CCD and the NYU Global Alumni Programs office designed the “Distinguished Alumni Speaker Series” to provide students with cutting edge industry updates from eminent professionals and develop in-depth engagement between alumni and students.
Each semester, we invite distinguished alum to speak to NYU Shanghai students about their industry experience and their career paths.
2021 Spring Online Distinguished Alumni Speaker Series
2020 Spring Online Distinguished Alumni Speaker Series
Previous Events

text_blocks.text: After surveying students about how they wanted to connect with NYU alumni, the CCD and the NYU Global Alumni Programs office designed the “Distinguished Alumni Speaker Series” to provide students with cutting edge industry updates from eminent professionals and develop in-depth engagement between alumni and students.
Each semester, we invite distinguished alum to speak to NYU Shanghai students about their industry experience and their career paths.
2021 Spring Online Distinguished Alumni Speaker Series
2020 Spring Online Distinguished Alumni Speaker Series
